channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: ‘The Beast’ personifies Zimbabwe’s quality rugby exports to the Springboks over the years
item.description: IOL The Zimbabwe visit to Gqeberha on Saturday was a reminder of the players from that part of the world who have graced the Springboks. Superb players such as Ray Mordt, Gary Teichmann, Bob Skinstad, and Tonderai Chavhanga. They all have a story, but the one I love is that of Tendai “The Beast” Mtawarira, a [...] The post ‘The Beast’ personifies Zimbabwe’s quality rugby exports to the Springboks over the years appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Serena Williams will play singles at Wimbledon after accepting a wild card invitation
item.description: LONDON — Serena Williams will play singles at Wimbledon after accepting a wild card invitation, the All England Club announced Sunday. The move comes after the 44-year-old Williams recently returned to competition in doubles after nearly four years away from professional tennis. And it means that Williams will play both singles and doubles at Wimbledon [...] The post Serena Williams will play singles at Wimbledon after accepting a wild card invitation appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Argentina may have America to thank for Lionel Messi’s latest World Cup heroics
item.description: ATLANTA — Lionel Messi’s move to America will look like a masterstroke if he leads Argentina to back-to-back World Cup titles. His decision to join Inter Miami in 2023 has already been good for all parties, raising the profile of soccer in the United States, delivering titles for his club and writing a new chapter [...] The post Argentina may have America to thank for Lionel Messi’s latest World Cup heroics appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: From Bulawayo to Netflix: How Sue Nyathi turned a Zimbabwean story into a global phenomenon @nehandaradio
item.description: What began as a self-published novel by a Zimbabwean investment analyst writing late into the night has become one of Netflix’s biggest African success stories, introducing Sue Nyathi’s work to millions worldwide. The post From Bulawayo to Netflix: How Sue Nyathi turned a Zimbabwean story into a global phenomenon appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Stability, currency trust propel industrial growth
item.description: THE Confederation of Zimbabwe Industries says 2025 was a good year for business due to policy consistency, macroeconomic stability and increased confidence in the local currency, which supported growth across key industry segments. According to the findings of CZI’s Annual Manufacturing Sector Survey 2025, unveiled in Harare yesterday, manufacturing recorded strong recovery across key performance [...] The post Stability, currency trust propel industrial growth appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Markets rebound as improving investor sentiment boosts demand for equities @ZSE_ZW
item.description: ZIMBABWE’S capital markets rebounded strongly in May, with the Zimbabwe Stock Exchange (ZSE) and the Victoria Falls Stock Exchange (VFEX) posting gains as improving investor sentiment, easing inflationary pressures and growing confidence in macroeconomic stability boosted demand for equities. Following a subdued April, investors returned to the market in search of quality assets, driving benchmark [...] The post Markets rebound as improving investor sentiment boosts demand for equities appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: High Court dismisses Chivayo bid to throw out Sonja’s divorce claims
item.description: HARARE – The High Court has dismissed an application by businessman Wicknell Munodaani Chivayo seeking to throw out claims filed against him by ex-wife Sonja Louise Madzikanda for division of assets, dissolution of marriage, spousal maintenance and a declaration of the existence and dissolution of a civil partnership. In a ruling handed down on Thursday, [...] The post High Court dismisses Chivayo bid to throw out Sonja’s divorce claims appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Matemadanda: The Lion of Gokwe who never lowered his rifle @bulawayo24
item.description: Comrades, patriots, children of Zimbabwe,We woke up today under the heavy clouds of grief, but also under the bright torch that Comrade Victor Matemadanda lit and carried for 66 years. He was born on... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s ambassador to Mozambique and Eswatini, Victor Matemadanda, dies aged 66 @zimsituation
item.description: ‘He flatly refused to let the slide into a Mugabe family dynasty’ Source: Zimbabwe’s ambassador to Mozambique and Eswatini, Victor Matemadanda, dies aged 66 – Zimbabwe News Now Victor Matemadanda HARARE – Zimbabwe’s ambassador to Mozambique and Eswatini, Victor Matemadanda, has died, the foreign affairs ministry announced on Sunday. He was 66. The cause of [...] The post Zimbabwe’s ambassador to Mozambique and Eswatini, Victor Matemadanda, dies aged 66 appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Shock as Zimbabwe ambassador and 2017 coup architect Victor Matemadanda dies after sudden illness @nehandaradio
item.description: Zimbabwe’s Ambassador to Mozambique and Eswatini, Victor Matemadanda, has died, prompting an outpouring of tributes from political figures, activists and journalists across the country. The post Shock as Zimbabwe ambassador and 2017 coup architect Victor Matemadanda dies after sudden illness appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Councils ordered to scale up service delivery . . . Eight minimum standards set as baseline for service delivery @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Councils ordered to scale up service delivery... Eight minimum standards set as baseline for service delivery – herald This comes as President Mnangagwa launched the Citizens Engagement and Scoring Platform on Thursday, which will see residents rate local authorities in terms of service delivery in eight service categories — water; sanitation; [...] The post Councils ordered to scale up service delivery... Eight minimum standards set as baseline for service delivery appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Fuel prices fall as Middle East tensions ease @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Fuel prices fall as Middle East tensions ease – herald Addressing delegates at the Annual Chamber of Mines Conference yesterday, Energy and Power Development Minister July Moyo said the Government was actively reviewing pump prices in line with favourable developments on the international market while maintaining its commitment to ensuring uninterrupted fuel supplies. Rutendo [...] The post Fuel prices fall as Middle East tensions ease appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
